content:
Sagittarius December 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Reinvent the self, deepen the shared bond
Key Dates New Moon Dec 7 (Sagittarius, 1st house — your sign) / Jupiter retrograde Dec 12 / Cold Full Moon Dec 24 (Cancer, 8th house)
Love 1st house New Moon in your sign is the year’s personal reset; the Cold Moon deepens intimacy and shared resources
Career Capricorn season Dec 21 stabilizes income; Jupiter (your ruler) retrograde Dec 12 reviews the bigger direction
Crystal of the Month Citrine
Lucky Colors Warm gold, deep purple, sunset orange
Lucky Number 1
Affirmation I reinvent the self at my own New Moon; I open to shared depth at the Cold Moon.

This Month’s Energy

Sagittarius, December 2026 opens with your personal New Year and closes with shared depth. The New Moon in Sagittarius on December 7 falls in your own sign — your 1st house of identity, body, and self — the most personal reset moment of your year. Then Jupiter (your ruler) turns retrograde on December 12 at 27°01′ Leo (your 9th house), the house Jupiter naturally rules — a deep review of belief, direction, and meaning. And the Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 lands in your 8th house of shared resources, intimacy, and psychological depth — a tender, private close. December’s pattern: reinvent the self early, deepen the bond late.

Key Dates for Sagittarius in December 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Sagittarius Do / Avoid
Dec 7 New Moon in Sagittarius (your 1st house — your sign) The personal reset of the year — fresh start in identity, body, self-direction, how you show up in the world Do: set a self-intention for 2027, change a habit, claim a new identity
Avoid: postponing the personal reset
Dec 12 Jupiter (your ruler) turns retrograde in Leo (your 9th house) Deep review of belief, direction, travel, study, publishing — the big-picture meaning of your life Do: re-read your philosophy, audit the direction, refine the teaching
Avoid: launching a major new publishing or travel venture before February 2027
Dec 15 Venus post-retrograde shadow ends Love and money conversations clarify; the fire settles Do: commit to the value, finalize the relationship plan
Avoid: re-opening old Venus-retrograde worth-debates
Dec 21 Sun enters Capricorn (your 2nd house) Capricorn season stabilizes income, possessions, self-worth through January Do: set the worth-standard, audit earnings, commit to the value
Avoid: spending past your means at the holidays
Dec 24 Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 8th house) Shared resources, intimacy, debts, inheritances, psychological depth illuminated; a tender close Do: address shared money, deepen intimacy, name a private truth
Avoid: avoiding the difficult shared conversation
Dec 31 Year-end threshold Natural review — what 2026 taught about self and shared depth Do: name the self you reinvented, the bond you deepened
Avoid: rushing into January without the reset complete

Career & Money

For Sagittarius, December’s career story turns on your ruler. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 (your 1st house) is your personal reset — how you show up, what you’ve become, who you are becoming in 2027.

Jupiter (your ruling planet) turns retrograde on December 12 in your 9th house — the house of belief, travel, study, publishing, and meaning. This is the year’s biggest directional review. Re-read your philosophy; audit the bigger direction; refine the teaching. Capricorn season (your 2nd house of income) from December 21 stabilizes earnings through January. Crystals for wealth can support the income work; the practical move is reinvent the self early, then refine the direction.

Love & Relationships

The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your own sign — your 1st house. For Sagittarius, this is the love signature of the month: relationship follows identity. The self you reinvent at this New Moon is the self partnership will meet in 2027.

Venus finishes her post-retrograde shadow on December 15 — fire-sign love settles. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 8th house) on December 24 deepens love into shared territory — shared resources, intimacy, psychological vulnerability. For Sagittarius (who can skim the surface), this is the work: let the bond go deep. Crystals for love can support the bond; the deeper practice is reinvent the self, then open the depth.

Health & Wellness

December is your birthday-season wellness reset. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your own sign — your 1st house of body and identity. Commit to a sustainable rhythm (movement, food, rest) on this date and the structure holds through the year.

Jupiter-ruled Sagittarius carries tension in the hips, thighs, and liver — holiday excess (rich food, alcohol, travel) lands here first. Citrine, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with solar warmth, abundance, and digestion — a useful symbolic companion for the dark season. Hip-opening stretches, moderation in indulgence, and actual rest between adventures carry you into January. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Citrine

Why Citrine fits Sagittarius this month. You are Jupiter-ruled and December opens with a New Moon in your own sign — your personal New Year. Citrine — traditionally tied to the sun, warmth, abundance, optimism, and joy — is the stone that carries Jupiter’s expansive fire into a focused solar point. Where Sunstone would scatter and Tiger’s Eye would ground, Citrine radiates: golden, transparent, with a fire-sign kinship that mirrors your ruler. Perfect for the 1st house Sagittarius New Moon (self) and the 8th house Cancer Cold Moon (depth).

How to use it during December 2026. Place Citrine on your solar plexus during meditation on December 7 (your Sagittarius New Moon). Carry it in your pocket through the Cold Moon (December 24).

Best date to use it: December 7, the New Moon in your own sign — hold Citrine at your solar plexus for 10 minutes at the New Moon (exact time if possible), naming the self you’re reinventing for 2027.

Read more: Citrine Meaning and Best Crystals for Sagittarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Sagittarius — December 2026

When: December 7, the New Moon in Sagittarius (your 1st house — your sign).
Crystal: Citrine.
Intention: Reinvent the self at your own New Moon.

  1. Cleanse Citrine in sunlight for 20 minutes on the morning of December 7 (your Sagittarius New Moon). Place it on a windowsill where the sun can find it.
  2. Set the intention at the New Moon moment: write down three things about your identity you’re ready to reinvent in 2027 — and the one self you’re claiming. Be specific (Sagittarius loves the big picture; this ritual asks for one concrete change).
  3. Act at the Cold Full Moon on December 24 (your 8th house): take the reinvented self into a shared depth — address shared money, deepen an intimacy, name a private truth. Hold Citrine during the conversation.
  4. Reflect at the Sagittarius New Moon in December 2027 (your 1st house again): how has the reinvention matured through the year? Hold Citrine during the review.

Shop Sagittarius Crystals for December 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Sagittarius crystal guide for stones connected with adventure, optimism, truth, and abundance — including the Citrine that focuses Jupiter’s expansive fire during your personal New Year. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Sagittarius December 2026

Is December 2026 a good month for Sagittarius?

It opens with your personal New Year. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 (your own sign) is the reset moment of the year. Jupiter (your ruler) turns retrograde December 12 for a directional review; the Cold Moon (Dec 24, your 8th house) deepens intimacy.

How will the Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 affect Sagittarius?

It falls in your own sign — your 1st house of identity, body, and self. This is the most personal reset of 2026: claim the self you’re becoming in 2027.

What does Jupiter retrograde (Dec 12) mean for Sagittarius?

Jupiter is your ruling planet, and it retrogrades in your 9th house (the house Jupiter naturally rules) — the year’s biggest review of belief, direction, travel, study, and publishing. Re-read your philosophy rather than launching new ventures.

What does the Cold Moon in Cancer on December 24 mean for Sagittarius?

It falls in your 8th house of shared resources, intimacy, and psychological depth — a tender close. Address shared money; deepen intimacy; name a private truth.

What is the best crystal for Sagittarius in December 2026?

Citrine — it focuses Jupiter’s expansive fire into a solar point, exactly what a 1st house Sagittarius New Moon plus an 8th house Cancer Cold Moon demand. See the full Sagittarius crystal guide →
